description: Subprocess-uniform invocation: <bin> protocol self-describe; read the filesystem symlink registry (snapshot at op-start, NN- order); build pre/post/rollback stdin JSON (§7); env BALLS_PROTOCOL/PLUGIN_NAME/PLUGIN_DEPTH; recursion guard (depth cap→plugin-free); stderr capture to logs/. NO return channel — plugins mutate the worktree.
title: §6 plugin dispatch (subprocess) + §7 wire payloads
